queries: E2E pipeline Error Handling and Recovery Strategies 2023
action.query: E2E pipeline Error Handling and Recovery Strategies 2023

annotations.title: Pipeline failure and error message - Azure Data Factory | Microsoft Learn
Best practices for error handling in pipelines | Digibee Documentation
Debugging Failing Tests and Test Pipelines | GitLab Docs
Concurrency, Error Handling, and DLQ | The Pipeline Framework
Why Your CI/CD Pipeline is Lying: Using Replay to Detect Flaky E2E Tests | Replay Blog
End-to-end Pipeline Monitoring | The GitLab Handbook

content.text:
Implementing effective error handling and recovery strategies in end-to-end (E2E) pipelines is crucial for maintaining system reliability and ensuring smooth operations. Below are several authoritative and recent resources that provide valuable insights into this topic:

1. **Pipeline Failure and Error Handling in Azure Data Factory**: This Microsoft Learn article discusses common error handling patterns, such as the Try-Catch-Proceed and Generic Error Handling approaches, and provides guidance on implementing these strategies in Azure Data Factory pipelines. ([learn.microsoft.com](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/data-factory/tutorial-pipeline-failure-error-handling?utm_source=openai))

2. **Best Practices for Error Handling in Pipelines by Digibee**: This documentation outlines best practices for error handling, including the use of Fail On Error and OnException configurations, and offers strategies for managing timeouts and concurrent operations to enhance pipeline reliability. ([docs.digibee.com](https://docs.digibee.com/documentation/pt-br/digibee-in-action/best-practices/best-practices-for-error-handling-in-pipelines?utm_source=openai))

3. **Debugging Failing Tests and Test Pipelines in GitLab**: GitLab's documentation provides insights into debugging E2E test failures, emphasizing the importance of monitoring and analyzing test pipelines to identify and resolve issues effectively. ([docs.gitlab.com](https://docs.gitlab.com/development/testing_guide/end_to_end/debugging_end_to_end_test_failures/?utm_source=openai))

4. **Concurrency, Error Handling, and Dead Letter Queues in The Pipeline Framework**: This guide explores advanced error handling patterns, including error context preservation and graceful degradation, and discusses configurations for retry limits and concurrency to improve pipeline robustness. ([pipelineframework.org](https://pipelineframework.org/guide/error-handling?utm_source=openai))

5. **Using Replay to Detect Flaky E2E Tests**: This blog post discusses the challenges of flaky tests in CI/CD pipelines and introduces Replay, a tool that uses temporal video analysis to detect and debug intermittent test failures, thereby enhancing the reliability of E2E tests. ([replay.build](https://www.replay.build/blog/why-your-ci-cd-pipeline-is-lying-using-replay-to-detect-flaky-e2e-tests?utm_source=openai))

6. **Best Practices for Error Handling in Test Cases by Tricentis**: This resource emphasizes the importance of adding recovery steps to tests, including defining recovery scenarios, retry levels, and cleanup scenarios, to ensure test stability and reliability. ([documentation.tricentis.com](https://documentation.tricentis.com/tosca/2420/en/content/best_practices/testcases_error_handling.htm?utm_source=openai))

7. **End-to-End Pipeline Monitoring in GitLab**: GitLab's handbook provides an overview of E2E test pipelines, their monitoring tools, and practices, highlighting the importance of regular monitoring and reporting to maintain pipeline health. ([handbook.gitlab.com](https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/engineering/testing/end-to-end-pipeline-monitoring/?utm_source=openai))

8. **Error Handling and Recovery in TestArchitect**: This guide details mechanisms for error handling in TestArchitect, including suppressing message dialogs, escaping on error, and taking action on problems, to allow tests to continue running after encountering unexpected difficulties. ([docs.testarchitect.com](https://docs.testarchitect.com/automation-guide/action-based-testing-language/the-test-language/error-handling-and-recovery/?utm_source=openai))

These resources offer comprehensive strategies and best practices for implementing effective error handling and recovery mechanisms in E2E pipelines, contributing to more resilient and reliable systems.
